en: Oh come, let us sing to the LORD; let us make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation!
zh: 來吧，我們來向耶和華歌唱， 向拯救我們的磐石歡呼。

en: Let us come into his presence with thanksgiving; let us make a joyful noise to him with songs of praise!
zh: 我們要來到他面前稱謝他， 用詩歌向他歡呼。

en: For the LORD is a great God, and a great King above all gods.
zh: 因為耶和華是偉大的 神， 是超越眾神的大君王。

en: In his hand are the depths of the earth; the heights of the mountains are his also.
zh: 地的深處在他手中， 山的高峰也都屬他。

en: The sea is his, for he made it, and his hands formed the dry land.
zh: 海洋屬他，因為是他創造的， 陸地也是他的手造成的。

en: Oh come, let us worship and bow down; let us kneel before the LORD, our Maker!
zh: 來吧，我們來俯伏敬拜， 在造我們的耶和華面前跪下。

en: For he is our God, and we are the people of his pasture, and the sheep of his hand. Today, if you hear his voice,
zh: 因為他是我們的 神， 我們是他草場上的子民， 是他手下的羊群。 如果你們今天聽從他的聲音，

en: do not harden your hearts, as at Meribah, as on the day at Massah in the wilderness,
zh: 就不要硬著心，好像在米利巴， 就是在曠野的瑪撒的日子一樣。

en: when your fathers put me to the test and put me to the proof, though they had seen my work.
zh: 在那裡你們的祖先雖曾見過我的作為， 還是試探我，考驗我。

en: For forty years I loathed that generation and said, "They are a people who go astray in their heart, and they have not known my ways."
zh: 四十年之久，我厭惡那個世代的人； 我曾說：“他們是心裡迷誤的人民， 不認識我的道路。”

en: Therefore I swore in my wrath, "They shall not enter my rest."
zh: 所以我在忿怒中起誓，說： “他們絕不可進入我的安息。”
